name: account-transaction
description: Tools for Portfolio.AccountTransaction on the ayunit MCP. Custody activity loaders — one skill per custodian (UBS Miami, Morgan Stanley, BTG Offshore/Cayman) that parse the export/API feed, apply field treatment, resolve assets/accounts/locks live, and insert validated trades + cash/GL movements — plus batch fixers: duplicate-trade-reconcile (de-duplicates restated/double-loaded trades against Portfolio.CustodyPosition, lock-aware) and compromissada-fix (normalises XP-loaded compromissadas/repos onto the cash-like convention, pair-consistent and lock-gated).
